'''âv-m-t-z''' ('''kavamtezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molder|molder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molder|molder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-m-t-z
|-
! Lemma
| kavamtezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamtezoko|thivamtezoko]] || [[word:jivamtezoko|jivamtezoko]] || [[word:shivamtezoko|shivamtezoko]] || [[word:kivamtezoko|kivamtezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamtezoko|thuthuvamtezoko]] || [[word:jujuvamtezoko|jujuvamtezoko]] || [[word:shushuvamtezoko|shushuvamtezoko]] || [[word:kukuvamtezoko|kukuvamtezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvamtezoko|thuvamtezoko]] || [[word:juvamtezoko|juvamtezoko]] || [[word:shuvamtezoko|shuvamtezoko]] || [[word:kuvamtezoko|kuvamtezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamtezoko|thuvamtezoko]] || [[word:juvamtezoko|juvamtezoko]] || [[word:shuvamtezoko|shuvamtezoko]] || [[word:kuvamtezoko|kuvamtezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevamtezoko|thevamtezoko]] || [[word:jevamtezoko|jevamtezoko]] || [[word:shevamtezoko|shevamtezoko]] || [[word:kevamtezoko|kevamtezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovamtezoko|thothovamtezoko]] || [[word:jojovamtezoko|jojovamtezoko]] || [[word:shoshovamtezoko|shoshovamtezoko]] || [[word:kokovamtezoko|kokovamtezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovamtezoko|thovamtezoko]] || [[word:jovamtezoko|jovamtezoko]] || [[word:shovamtezoko|shovamtezoko]] || [[word:kovamtezoko|kovamtezoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovamtezoko|thovamtezoko]] || [[word:jovamtezoko|jovamtezoko]] || [[word:shovamtezoko|shovamtezoko]] || [[word:kovamtezoko|kovamtezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvamtezoko|thĂŠvamtezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvamtezoko|jĂŠvamtezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvamtezoko|shĂŠvamtezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvamtezoko|kĂŠvamtezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamtezoko|thathavamtezoko]] || [[word:jajavamtezoko|jajavamtezoko]] || [[word:shashavamtezoko|shashavamtezoko]] || [[word:kakavamtezoko|kakavamtezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamtezoko|thavamtezoko]] || [[word:javamtezoko|javamtezoko]] || [[word:shavamtezoko|shavamtezoko]] || [[word:kavamtezoko|kavamtezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavamtezoko|thavamtezoko]] || [[word:javamtezoko|javamtezoko]] || [[word:shavamtezoko|shavamtezoko]] || [[word:kavamtezoko|kavamtezoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavamtezithi|shavamtezithi]] || [[word:shavamteziji|shavamteziji]] || [[word:shavamtezishi|shavamtezishi]] || [[word:shavamteziki|shavamteziki]]
